description.en: AnArrayBuffer,TypedArray, orDataViewprovided by the relying party's server and used as acryptographic challenge. This value will be signed by the authenticator and the signature will be sent back as part ofAuthenticatorAttestationResponse.attestationObject.

description.en: AnArrayBuffer,TypedArray, orDataVieworiginating from the relying party's server and used as acryptographic challenge. This value will be signed by the authenticator and the signature will be sent back as part of theAuthenticatorAssertionResponse.signature(available in theresponseproperty of thePublicKeyCredentialobject returned by a successfulget()call).
